item.title: Philips North America Llc: Philips Avalon Fetal Monitor, FM20, Part number M2702A, Part M2703A Recall
item.product: Philips Avalon Fetal Monitor, FM20, Part number M2702A, Part M2703A
item.summary: Monitor has incorrect assembly of the speaker connector which can cause device cables to be pulled out of the housing and increase the risk of intermittent or permanent loss of speaker output. Product details: Philips Avalon Fetal Monitor, FM20, Part number M2702A, Part M2703A
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide distribution - US Nationwide and The countries of AE, AT, AU, BE, BG, BH, BR, CA, CH, CN, CR, CZ, DE, ES, FI, FR, GB, GR, HK, ID, IL, IN, IT, JO, JP, KR, KR, LT, LU, LV, MX, MY, NL, NZ, OM, SA, SE, SG, SI, TR, TW, ZA.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
